title: Creative Co-Op, White, Round Stoneware Mortar and Pestle Set, Set of 2, Medium
description:
About this item
A set of 2 round stoneware mortar and pestle with a white color and a smooth texture, ideal for grinding spices, herbs, nuts, or garlic
A simple and classic piece that can fit various decor styles, such as farmhouse, French country, modern, boho, or Scandinavian
Can be used to prepare sauces, dips, marinades, or dressings, or as a decorative item or a gift
Made of stoneware, these mortar and pestle are durable, easy to clean, and resistant to stains and odors
Measures 8 inches in diameter and 3 inches in height
